title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NSDC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NSDC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Curriculum Developer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
